data.title: XRP price at $1.40, analysts predict $2.80 & $42 targets, technical signals mixed with resistance at $1.48.
data.description: The digital currency XRP is currently being traded at $1.40. Analysts have conflicting views on its future value, with Standard Chartered projecting a target price of $2.80 and EGRAG predicting a substantial increase to $42. Technical analysis indicates a neutral momentum for XRP, with a significant resistance level identified at $1.48.

data.title: Biomea Fusion Presents Phase II COVALENT-111 Data in Type 2 Diabetes at the 19th International Conference on Advanced Technologies & Treatments for Diabetes 2026
data.description: On March 14, 2026, San Carlos-based company Biomea Fusion, Inc. disclosed that Dr. Juan Pablo Frías presented at the 19th International Conference on Advanced Technologies & Treatments for Diabetes in Barcelona. The presentation detailed encouraging outcomes from the Phase II COVALENT-111 study of icovamenib in type 2 diabetes patients, following a 52-week assessment. Biomea Fusion, listed as BMEA on Nasdaq, focuses on diabetes and obesity and is deemed a clinical-stage entity. The presentation aimed to showcase the positive findings regarding the efficacy, safety, and tolerability of icovamenib in treating T2D.

data.title: Video Series "What International Friends Think of Shandong": Great Food, Enchanting Scenery
data.description: In Jinan, China, as of March 14, 2026, ten international individuals were interviewed by Qilu Evening News • Qilu Yidian between February 10 and 20 in Shandong. They provided insights on the region's cuisine and attractions.

data.title: BNB price set to hit $750-$920 by early April 2026, with short-term target at $671-$689 and breakout level at $689.15, supported by $633.
data.description: A forecast for BNB's price suggests a short-term target between $671 and $689 within a week. The medium-term projection over a month anticipates a range of $750 to $920. A bullish breakout is expected at $689.15, while a critical support level is noted at $633.

data.title: ISLE 2026 Successfully Defining New Trends in Smart Display and System Integration
data.description: Located in Shenzhen, China, the ISLE 2026 event concluded successfully on March 7 at the Shenzhen World Exhibition & Convention Center. Renowned as a global platform for display innovation and system integration, ISLE 2026 highlighted the latest advancements in the industry. The event attracted an impressive number of attendees, with over tens of thousands of participants visiting the exhibition. This year's ISLE emphasized comprehensive solutions and cutting-edge technologies, setting the stage for future developments in the sector.

data.title: BTC price expected to range from $75,000 to $150,000 by end of 2026, with targets at $72,900-$75,200 in 1 week and $68,000-$78,000 in 1 month. Bullish breakout at $75,225.
data.description: Summary of BTC Price Predictions indicate a short-term target of $72,900 to $75,200 within a week. The medium-term forecast suggests a range of $68,000 to $78,000 over the course of a month. The bullish breakout level is set at $75,225, while the critical support level is identified at $68,031.

data.title: China International Supply Chain Expo Unveils AI Zone as 100-Day Countdown Begins With 500+ Exhibitors
data.description: With 100 days left until the start, the fourth China International Supply Chain Expo (CISCE) in Beijing is gearing up for its upcoming edition. Under the theme "Connecting the World for a Shared Future," the event has grown significantly since its inception, becoming a crucial platform for fostering global connections.

data.title: BlackRock rules out 'exotic' crypto ETFs, introduces staked Ether ETF alongside Bitcoin and Ether in 2024.
data.description: On Thursday, BlackRock unveiled a new staked Ether exchange-traded fund, marking a significant expansion of its cryptocurrency products. This move comes after the successful launch of its flagship Bitcoin and Ether ETFs in 2024. The addition of the staked Ether ETF demonstrates BlackRock's commitment to diversifying its crypto offerings and tapping into the growing market demand. This development showcases BlackRock's dedication to staying competitive in the rapidly evolving cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Vimgreen's Novel A2AR Antagonist Receives CDE IND Approval for NASH/MASH Therapy
data.description: In Hangzhou, China on March 14, 2026, Vimgreen Pharmaceuticals, a prominent company specializing in adenosine signaling modulation, disclosed the successful approval of its Investigational New Drug (IND) application for VG081821. This drug is intended for the treatment of non-alcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH), a condition that is becoming more commonly known among medical professionals.

data.title: Oil price spike burdens Pakistan's fragile economy; impacts Eid preps & farming with 100% Gulf oil reliance.
data.description: Citizens in a nation heavily reliant on the Persian Gulf for nearly all its oil supply are facing challenges as they gear up for Eid al-Fitr celebrations and farmers gear up for harvest season. The country, which heavily depends on the Persian Gulf for oil imports, is experiencing a squeeze that is impacting families and farmers alike during these important times.

data.title: China's investment in electric vehicles and renewables helps reduce foreign oil dependence, showing success over the years.
data.description: After years of investment in clean energy sources such as electric vehicles, Beijing has succeeded in reducing its reliance on foreign oil. This strategic effort has been ongoing for decades and has now started to show results. The city has significantly decreased its dependency on imported oil and has seen a notable increase in the adoption of electric vehicles. This shift towards clean energy has not only contributed to reducing pollution but has also enhanced energy security. The long-term commitment to investing in sustainable energy solutions has proven to be successful, showcasing a shift towards a more environmentally friendly and self-sufficient energy model in Beijing.

data.title: Meta Mulls Cutting 20% Or More Of Jobs Amid Big AI Spending, Setbacks
data.description: Rumors suggest that Meta Platforms is considering significant layoffs in response to expensive investments in artificial intelligence. The layoffs could impact 20% or more of the company's workforce. This move comes as a response to substantial spending on AI technology and setbacks faced by the company.

data.title: Dream Finders Homes named the Official Home Builder of the Tampa Bay Rays and Tampa Bay Rowdies
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida, the Tampa Bay Rays have entered a new multi-year partnership with Dream Finders Homes (NYSE: DFH) starting this season. Dream Finders Homes, named the 2025 National Builder of the Year, is now the Official Home Builder of the Tampa Bay Rays. The collaboration will include various marketing initiatives throughout the season to enhance the visibility and brand awareness of Dream Finders Homes in the Tampa Bay area. This will involve participation in fan-centric events and activities.

data.title: Mattel Presents at 2026 UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference to Discuss Strategy and Outlook
data.description: Mattel, Inc., a renowned global play and family entertainment firm, with ownership of a significant brand portfolio, engaged in a keynote presentation at the UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference on March 12, 2026. Ynon Kreiz, the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, conducted interviews with Bloomberg and CNBC during the event. The discussions included the company’s projections for the current year and beyond. Mattel, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol MAT.

data.title: Investors in TikTok to pay $10B fee to Trump admin, showcasing White House meddling in corporate deals.
data.description: The substantial fee is a recent instance of the White House involving itself in corporate transactions in unorthodox and forceful manners.

data.title: Billionaire predicts stablecoins to dominate global payments in a decade. They are faster, cheaper than fiat.
data.description: According to Stanley Druckenmiller, stablecoins are deemed to be more efficient, quicker, and cost-effective compared to fiat currencies that operate on conventional banking systems.

data.title: CarMax Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of CarMax, Inc. - KMX
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, disclosed the initiation of an inquiry by KSF into CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX). This investigation by the firm is significant as it focuses on examining potential issues involving CarMax. This development underscores the attention being given to the company's operations and financial matters.

data.title: Bitcoin approaches $74,000, indicating ongoing bear market as tech stocks' correlation remains a factor.
data.description: Despite its strong performance during the week, Bitcoin continues to show a strong correlation with tech stocks and reacts to spot ETF flows. This indicates that the bear market may not be completely over. The cryptocurrency saw notable fluctuations, with BTC reaching a high of $65,000 before dropping to $60,000. Investors remain cautious as Bitcoin's price movements remain intertwined with broader market trends.

data.title: 1 in 14 Food Service Workers Was Unemployed Last Month - OysterLink
data.description: According to recent data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics, the unemployment rate in the food service industry was 7.1% in February 2026, which is almost double the national average. This means that approximately 1 out of every 14 food service workers was unemployed during that time. The statistics were revealed in a report released on March 13, 2026 in Austin, Texas.
